name: Gamification XP and coins update visibly after completing a Feynman evaluation
description: After a successful Feynman evaluation, the Server Action calls rewardAction('feynman') which atomically increments XP by 15 and coins by 5 via the increment_profile_rewards RPC. The test verifies that the dashboard stat bar (or session stats) reflects the new XP/coin totals after returning from Feynman Mode — confirming the gamification round-trip (Server Action → Supabase RPC → UI) works end-to-end.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Note the current XP value shown in the dashboard header or stat bar
Navigate to /app/feynman and select any available topic
Type a detailed explanation of at least 80 characters and click submit, then wait for the evaluation to complete
Verify the evaluation result appears with gap analysis segments — confirming the Server Action completed successfully
Navigate back to the dashboard at /app

Verify the XP value shown in the dashboard header or stat bar is higher than it was before the evaluation — confirming the gamification increment_profile_rewards RPC ran and the UI reflects the updated total
